nodes.name: App
nodes.description: Root application component with routing, providers (QueryClient, Theme, UnsavedChanges), and lazy-loaded page imports

nodes.name: ProtectedRoute
nodes.description: Auth guard component that checks useAuthStore and redirects unauthenticated users to /login

nodes.name: MFARouteGuards
nodes.description: MFA route guards: MFAVerifyGuard requires MFA pending token, MFASetupGuard blocks if MFA already enabled

nodes.name: ToastContainer
nodes.description: Global toast notification container consuming useToastStore

nodes.name: UnsavedChangesDialog
nodes.description: Dialog prompting user to save or discard unsaved changes before navigation

nodes.name: MainLayout
nodes.description: Main app layout with sidebar navigation, header, and Outlet for nested routes. Uses useAuthStore and tasksApi

nodes.name: FarmDashboard
nodes.description: Main farm module dashboard showing key metrics and quick actions. Uses farmApi and renders GlobalFarmAnalyticsModal

nodes.name: FarmList
nodes.description: Paginated farm card grid with search/filter. Renders FarmCard, CreateFarmModal, EditFarmModal, FarmAnalyticsModal

nodes.name: FarmDetail
nodes.description: Farm detail page with tabs (blocks, map, history, weather). Uses useFarm, useFarmBlocks, useAvailableFarmingYears hooks

nodes.name: BlockDetail
nodes.description: Block detail page with tabs for alerts, automation, harvests, archives. Uses farmApi service

nodes.name: FarmCard
nodes.description: Farm summary card displaying farm info, navigates to farm detail on click

nodes.name: BlockCard
nodes.description: Block card with state colors, renders PlantAssignmentModal, PendingTasksWarningModal, BlockAnalyticsModal

nodes.name: BlockGrid
nodes.description: Grid layout of BlockCard components with state filter tabs

nodes.name: PhysicalBlockGrid
nodes.description: Physical layout grid rendering PhysicalBlockCard components

nodes.name: PhysicalBlockCard
nodes.description: Physical block card showing block in spatial layout view

nodes.name: BlockDetailsModal
nodes.description: Comprehensive modal: block header, planting details, harvest history, growth timeline. Uses farmApi

nodes.name: BlockAnalyticsModal
nodes.description: Block analytics modal with tabs: overview, yield, timeline, tasks, alerts. Uses useBlockAnalytics hook and recharts

nodes.name: FarmAnalyticsModal
nodes.description: Farm-level analytics modal with tabs: overview, block comparison, historical trends, state details. Uses useFarmAnalytics and recharts

nodes.name: GlobalFarmAnalyticsModal
nodes.description: System-wide analytics modal: farm comparison, production timeline, performance insights. Uses useGlobalAnalytics and recharts

nodes.name: FarmMapView
nodes.description: MapLibre GL map view showing farm and block boundaries with state colors. Uses mapConfig

nodes.name: CreateFarmModal
nodes.description: Farm creation modal with form, map boundary drawing. Uses farmApi, useMapDrawing, useUnsavedChanges, toast.store

nodes.name: EditFarmModal
nodes.description: Farm edit modal for updating farm details

nodes.name: CreateBlockModal
nodes.description: Block creation modal with map boundary drawing. Uses useMapDrawing hook

nodes.name: EditBlockModal
nodes.description: Block edit modal for updating block details

nodes.name: BlockAlertsTab
nodes.description: Block detail tab displaying alerts list for a block

nodes.name: BlockAutomationTab
nodes.description: Block detail tab for automation/IoT integration

nodes.name: BlockHarvestsTab
nodes.description: Block detail tab showing harvest records

nodes.name: BlockArchivesTab
nodes.description: Block detail tab showing archived planting data

nodes.name: BlockHarvestEntryModal
nodes.description: Modal for entering harvest data for a block

nodes.name: FarmHistoryTab
nodes.description: Farm detail tab showing historical farm activity

nodes.name: PlantAssignmentModal
nodes.description: Modal for assigning plants to blocks

nodes.name: PendingTasksWarningModal
nodes.description: Warning modal shown when block has pending tasks before state transition

nodes.name: PlantDataCard
nodes.description: Card displaying plant data summary. Uses plantDataEnhancedApi for formatting

nodes.name: PlantDataDetail
nodes.description: Detailed view of a plant data entry

nodes.name: AddPlantDataModal
nodes.description: Modal for adding new plant data entries

nodes.name: EditPlantDataModal
nodes.description: Modal for editing existing plant data entries

nodes.name: AddVirtualCropModal
nodes.description: Modal for adding virtual crops to blocks

nodes.name: EmptyVirtualBlockModal
nodes.description: Modal for emptying virtual block crops

nodes.name: FarmingYearSelector
nodes.description: Dropdown selector for farming year filter

nodes.name: FarmAIChat
nodes.description: Floating AI chat widget for farm assistant. Uses useFarmAIChat hook for natural language queries and action confirmation

nodes.name: EditFarmBoundaryModal
nodes.description: Modal for editing farm GeoJSON boundary on map

nodes.name: BlockGrid (dashboard)
nodes.description: Dashboard block grid rendering CompactBlockCard components

nodes.name: CompactBlockCard
nodes.description: Compact block card for dashboard with state-specific layouts. Uses useBlockActions, renders QuickPlanModal, ResolveAlertModal, BlockDetailsModal, BlockHarvestEntryModal, BlockAnalyticsModal

nodes.name: DashboardFilters
nodes.description: Filter controls for farm dashboard: state, search, performance, sort. Uses types from useDashboardFilters

nodes.name: DashboardHeader
nodes.description: Dashboard header showing farm info and summary metrics

nodes.name: FarmSelector
nodes.description: Dropdown to select active farm. Calls getFarms from farmApi

nodes.name: DashboardSettings
nodes.description: Dashboard configuration panel for color/icon/layout settings

nodes.name: QuickPlanModal
nodes.description: Quick planning modal for block state transitions

nodes.name: ResolveAlertModal
nodes.description: Modal for resolving block alerts

nodes.name: AIAnalyticsChat
nodes.description: AI analytics chat component using useAIAnalytics hook for conversational data exploration

nodes.name: AddWidgetModal
nodes.description: Modal for adding widgets to the main dashboard

nodes.name: BackupCodesModal
nodes.description: Modal displaying MFA backup codes

nodes.name: FarmManager
nodes.description: Farm module router: sub-routes for dashboard, block-monitor, farms, farm detail, block detail, plants

nodes.name: FarmDashboardPage
nodes.description: Block monitor dashboard page. Uses useDashboardData, useDashboardConfig, useDashboardFilters hooks

nodes.name: PlantDataLibrary
nodes.description: Plant data library page with card grid, detail view, add/edit modals, CSV import/export. Uses plantDataEnhancedApi

nodes.name: Login
nodes.description: Login page with form validation (react-hook-form + zod). Uses useAuthStore and usePageVisibility

nodes.name: Register
nodes.description: User registration page

nodes.name: MFASetupPage
nodes.description: MFA TOTP setup page with QR code and backup codes

nodes.name: MFAVerifyPage
nodes.description: MFA verification page for TOTP code entry

nodes.name: Dashboard
nodes.description: Main dashboard page with draggable widget grid (react-grid-layout). Uses useDashboardStore

nodes.name: Profile
nodes.description: User profile page

nodes.name: Settings
nodes.description: User settings page

nodes.name: AIAnalytics
nodes.description: AI Analytics page rendering AIAnalyticsChat component

nodes.name: OperationsDashboard
nodes.description: Operations module dashboard page

nodes.name: FarmBlocksView
nodes.description: Operations view of blocks within a farm

nodes.name: BlockTaskList
nodes.description: Task list for a specific block in operations module

nodes.name: InventoryDashboard
nodes.description: Inventory management dashboard

nodes.name: CRMPage
nodes.description: CRM customers list page

nodes.name: CustomerDetailPage
nodes.description: Customer detail view page

nodes.name: HRDashboardPage
nodes.description: HR module dashboard page

nodes.name: EmployeeListPage
nodes.description: Employee list page

nodes.name: EmployeeDetailPage
nodes.description: Employee detail page with contract, visa, insurance, performance tabs

nodes.name: LogisticsDashboardPage
nodes.description: Logistics module dashboard page

nodes.name: VehicleManagementPage
nodes.description: Vehicle management page

nodes.name: RouteManagementPage
nodes.description: Route management page

nodes.name: ShipmentTrackingPage
nodes.description: Shipment tracking page

nodes.name: SalesDashboardPage
nodes.description: Sales module dashboard page

nodes.name: SalesOrdersPage
nodes.description: Sales orders list page

nodes.name: InventoryPage
nodes.description: Sales inventory page

nodes.name: PurchaseOrdersPage
nodes.description: Purchase orders page

nodes.name: ReturnsPage
nodes.description: Returns management page

nodes.name: MarketingDashboardPage
nodes.description: Marketing module dashboard page

nodes.name: CampaignManagementPage
nodes.description: Campaign management page

nodes.name: BudgetManagementPage
nodes.description: Marketing budget management page

nodes.name: EventManagementPage
nodes.description: Marketing event management page

nodes.name: ChannelManagementPage
nodes.description: Marketing channel management page

nodes.name: UserManagementPage
nodes.description: Admin user management page

nodes.name: NotFound
nodes.description: 404 Not Found page

nodes.name: WasteInventoryList
nodes.description: Waste inventory list page

nodes.name: ClearCache
nodes.description: Debug page for clearing browser cache and storage

nodes.name: useFarmAnalytics
nodes.description: Fetches farm analytics from /v1/farm/farms/{farmId}/analytics via apiClient

nodes.name: useDashboardFilters
nodes.description: Client-side filtering/sorting for DashboardBlock[]. Supports state, search, performance, delay, alerts, farming year filters with sessionStorage persistence

nodes.name: useDashboardData
nodes.description: Fetches dashboard data from /v1/farm/dashboard/farms/{farmId} via apiClient with auto-refresh

nodes.name: useDashboardConfig
nodes.description: LocalStorage-persisted dashboard color/icon/layout configuration. No API calls

nodes.name: useBlockActions
nodes.description: Quick transition and harvest actions via apiClient. PATCH quick-transition, POST quick-harvest

nodes.name: useBlockAnalytics
nodes.description: Fetches block analytics from /v1/farm/farms/{farmId}/blocks/{blockId}/analytics via apiClient

nodes.name: useAIAnalytics
nodes.description: Sends AI analytics queries to /v1/ai/chat via apiClient. Manages conversation history

nodes.name: useFarmAIChat
nodes.description: Manages Farm AI chat state, message sending via sendFarmAIChat/confirmFarmAIAction from farmApi

nodes.name: useGlobalAnalytics
nodes.description: Fetches global farm analytics from /v1/farm/farms/analytics/global via apiClient

nodes.name: useWeatherData
nodes.description: Fetches weather data via weatherApi.getAgriData with auto-refresh

nodes.name: useFarms
nodes.description: React Query hooks for farm CRUD. Uses farmApi service and queryKeys config

nodes.name: useDashboard
nodes.description: React Query hooks for dashboard data. Uses dashboardDataService and queryKeys

nodes.name: useFarmingYears
nodes.description: React Query hooks for farming year configuration. Uses farmApi and queryKeys

nodes.name: useMFA
nodes.description: React Query hooks for MFA setup/enable/status. Uses apiClient with sessionStorage caching

nodes.name: useSales
nodes.description: React Query hooks for sales operations. Uses salesApi and queryKeys

nodes.name: usePageVisibility
nodes.description: Page Visibility API hooks for detecting tab focus and mobile device

nodes.name: useUnsavedChanges
nodes.description: beforeunload handler and UnsavedChangesContext integration for form dirty state tracking

nodes.name: useMapDrawing
nodes.description: Polygon drawing state management with turf.js area calculations for map boundary editing

nodes.name: apiClient
nodes.description: Axios instance with auth interceptors, token refresh queue, rate limit handling, error toast integration

nodes.name: farmApi
nodes.description: ~80 exported functions for farms, blocks, plant data, plantings, alerts, harvests, archives, virtual blocks, spacing, farming year config, IoT, SenseHub, AI chat via apiClient

nodes.name: authService
nodes.description: AuthService singleton: login, register, logout, refresh, MFA. Calls /v1/auth/* via apiClient

nodes.name: alertsApi
nodes.description: Alert CRUD, resolve, dismiss. Calls /v1/farm/farms/{farmId}/blocks/{blockId}/alerts/* via apiClient

nodes.name: dashboardService
nodes.description: DashboardService class for widget layout and data. Calls /v1/dashboard/* via apiClient

nodes.name: dashboardDataService
nodes.description: Aggregated dashboard data via /v1/farm/dashboard/summary plus legacy individual calls

nodes.name: crmService
nodes.description: Customer CRUD. Calls /v1/crm/customers/* via apiClient

nodes.name: hrService
nodes.description: Employee, Contract, Visa, Insurance, Performance CRUD. Calls /v1/hr/* via apiClient

nodes.name: salesService
nodes.description: Orders, Inventory, Purchase Orders, Returns, Dashboard. Calls /v1/sales/* via apiClient

nodes.name: logisticsService
nodes.description: Vehicles, Routes, Shipments, Dashboard. Calls /v1/logistics/* via apiClient

nodes.name: marketingService
nodes.description: Campaigns, Budgets, Channels, Events, Dashboard. Calls /v1/marketing/* via apiClient

nodes.name: plantDataEnhancedApi
nodes.description: Enhanced plant data CRUD, clone, CSV import/export. Calls /v1/farm/plant-data-enhanced/* via apiClient

nodes.name: tasksApi
nodes.description: Task CRUD, harvest entries, completion. Calls /v1/farm/tasks/* via apiClient

nodes.name: weatherApi
nodes.description: Current weather, forecast, agri-data. Calls /v1/farm/farms/{farmId}/weather/* via apiClient

nodes.name: inventoryApi
nodes.description: Harvest/Input/Asset inventory CRUD, movements, categories. Calls /v1/farm/inventory/* via apiClient

nodes.name: useAuthStore
nodes.description: Zustand store with persist: user, isAuthenticated, isLoading, mfaRequired. Actions: login, register, logout, loadUser, verifyMfa. Uses authService

nodes.name: useDashboardStore
nodes.description: Zustand store with persist: widgets, widgetData, layout. Uses dashboardDataService and queryClient

nodes.name: useToastStore
nodes.description: Zustand toast notification store with convenience functions for success, error, warning, info toasts

nodes.name: farm types
nodes.description: Core farm type definitions: Farm, Block, PlantData, DashboardBlock, enums, constants for block states/colors

nodes.name: alert types
nodes.description: Alert type definitions: severity, status, type enums and request/response interfaces

nodes.name: analytics types
nodes.description: Block analytics and AI analytics types: yield, timeline, task, performance, alert analytics and chat interfaces

nodes.name: farmAI types
nodes.description: Farm AI chat types: chat messages, pending actions, growth stage info, confirm action request/response

nodes.name: farm-analytics types
nodes.description: Farm-level analytics types: aggregated metrics, state breakdown, block comparison, historical trends

nodes.name: global-analytics types
nodes.description: Global analytics types: system-wide aggregated metrics, farm summaries, performance insights

nodes.name: task types
nodes.description: Task type definitions: task type/status enums, harvest grade, task and harvest entry interfaces

nodes.name: inventory types
nodes.description: Inventory type definitions: harvest, input, asset inventory interfaces with category enums

nodes.name: crm types
nodes.description: CRM type definitions: customer type/status enums, customer and address interfaces

nodes.name: hr types
nodes.description: HR type definitions: employee status enum, employee and contract type interfaces

nodes.name: logistics types
nodes.description: Logistics type definitions: vehicle type/status enums and vehicle interface

nodes.name: marketing types
nodes.description: Marketing type definitions: campaign status enum, campaign and metrics interfaces

nodes.name: sales types
nodes.description: Sales type definitions: order status/payment status enums, sales order and order item interfaces

nodes.name: returns types
nodes.description: Re-exports return-related types from sales.ts

nodes.name: react-query.config
nodes.description: QueryClient with optimized defaults (30s staleTime, 5m gcTime). Exports queryKeys factory for farms, blocks, sales, dashboard, mfa

nodes.name: mapConfig
nodes.description: Map configuration: UAE default center, satellite/OSM styles, polygon colors for block states, drawing styles

edges.context: App renders <ProtectedRoute /> wrapping all protected routes
App renders <MFAVerifyGuard /> and <MFASetupGuard /> for MFA routes
App renders <MainLayout /> inside ProtectedRoute for all authenticated pages
App renders <ToastContainer /> globally for toast notifications
App renders <UnsavedChangesDialog /> globally for navigation warnings
App imports queryClient from react-query.config for QueryClientProvider
App lazy-loads and renders <FarmManager /> at /farm/* route
App lazy-loads and renders <Dashboard /> at /dashboard route
App lazy-loads and renders <Login /> at /login route
App lazy-loads and renders <AIAnalytics /> at /ai-analytics route
FarmDashboardPage uses useDashboardData hook to fetch block data
FarmDashboardPage uses useDashboardConfig for dashboard settings
FarmDashboardPage uses useDashboardFilters for block filtering/sorting
FarmDashboardPage renders dashboard <BlockGrid /> for block cards
FarmDashboard calls farmApi for dashboard metrics
FarmList calls farmApi to fetch farms
FarmDetail uses useFarm, useFarmSummary, useFarmBlocks hooks
BlockDetail calls farmApi for block data
BlockCard calls farmApi for block summary
CompactBlockCard uses useBlockActions for quick transitions
CreateFarmModal calls farmApi to create farms
CreateFarmModal uses useMapDrawing for boundary drawing
CreateFarmModal uses useUnsavedChanges for form dirty state
CreateBlockModal uses useMapDrawing for boundary drawing
FarmMapView imports DEFAULT_CENTER and DEFAULT_ZOOM from mapConfig
Login uses useAuthStore for login action
ProtectedRoute uses useAuthStore to check auth
MFARouteGuards uses useAuthStore to check MFA state
MainLayout uses useAuthStore for user info
useFarms hooks call farmApi via React Query
useAuthStore calls authService for auth operations
